title: Diana Hoff Renaissance Email — May resubmission gratitude / advice ask
html:
TL;DR

  • April 13, 2021 email draft (and a brainstorm-bullet version above it) from Yahir to Diana Hoff — re-establishing contact two years after meeting her at Young Entrepreneurs Business Week in Eugene (2019), now asking for guidance on his second Renaissance Scholarship submission.
  • Names mentor Khaymanta Fajardo (current Renaissance scholar) as the mentor who helped on the first February submission.
  • Frame: Feb deadline missed, optimistic about May resubmission, "diligently improving my application."
  • Structurally a debt of gratitude email — opens with the mock-interview memory, expresses gratitude, then asks for help.
  • Bullet-brainstorm above the email shows the move: "Khaymanta 'mentor' / Got the opportunity of meeting you at YEBW / What advice can you provide" — the message-skeleton before the polished version.

Notes

This is a textbook re-engagement. Yahir sat on a Diana Hoff connection from 2019 (mock interview at YEBW) and reactivated it at the moment of pressing need — Renaissance resubmission. The phrase "I felt compelled to show my gratitude" is doing structural work: it positions the ask as gratitude-first, not transaction-first.

Khaymanta Fajardo gets her second mention here (after July todos) — promote-eligible if she shows up once more. This email is also Diana Hoff's third+ mention across the vault — promotes diana hoff from stub to real entity in this same operation.

Outcome: per the April 21 "Renaissance no" note referenced in the broader Renaissance arc, Yahir was ultimately not selected — but the Ford scholarship landed and funded undergrad anyway.

Connections

  • diana hoff · khaymanta fajardo — mentors-of-record
  • renaissance scholarship · yebw · eugene or — the institutional context
  • · debt of gratitude — the rhetorical frames
  • 2020 12 23 core questions to answer for essays — the prompt-master that fed both submissions
  • 2021 07 06 contact diana hoff summer todos — the next-mention follow-up

Privacy

  • No PII or secrets.
